$instructions: 1. Create each sub-agent (KA, Genie Space, UC functions) first
2. Fill in the agent definitions below
4. The endpoint name will be: mas-{first_8_chars_of_tile_id}-endpoint
5. Use that short tile_id prefix as MAS_TILE_ID in app.yaml
name: TODO_Demo_Supervisor
instructions: You are the TODO AI Advisor. You orchestrate sub-agents to answer questions about TODO domain. Always use tools to get real data before answering. Be specific with numbers, IDs, and entity names.

agents.$comment: Genie Space agent — natural language queries over Delta Lake tables
agents.name: TODO_data
agents.description: Query TODO data tables using natural language. Use this for any questions about TODO domain data.

agents.$comment: Knowledge Assistant (KA) — answers from uploaded docs/SOPs
agents.name: TODO_knowledge_base
agents.description: Look up standard operating procedures, policies, and domain knowledge.

agents.$comment: UC function agent — custom Python functions registered in Unity Catalog
agents.$note: MCP create_or_update_mas doesn't support UC function agents. Use REST API directly.
agents.name: TODO_calculator
agents.description: Calculate TODO metrics using custom logic.

agents.$comment: MCP connection agent — Lakebase write access for the MAS
agents.$note: Create an MCP connection in the workspace first, then reference it here.
agents.name: mcp-lakebase-connection
agents.description: Write operational data to Lakebase PostgreSQL tables.
